title: Smart Choice 120 Biodegradable Dog Poop Bags – Extra Strong & Leak-Resistant with Easy Tie Handles – Eco-Friendly Waste Bags for Dogs
features: 120 Biodegradable Dog Waste Bags Eco-friendly design helps reduce plastic waste—perfect for environmentally conscious pet owners.
Easy Tie Handles for Quick, Hygienic Use Sturdy tie handles make sealing and carrying bags easy—no mess, no fuss on walks or at home.
Extra Strong & Leak-Proof Material Tough, tear-resistant plastic keeps hands clean and messes contained.
Unscented for Sensitive Noses No added fragrance—ideal for dogs and owners who prefer a clean, neutral experience.
Space-Saving Pack for Home or Travel Slim, flat packaging stores neatly in drawers, car glove compartments, or by your front door.
description: Handle pet clean-up the responsible way with Smart Choice Biodegradable Poop Bags. These unscented, eco-friendly waste bags are strong, leak-resistant, and equipped with easy-tie handles to make walks and waste disposal easier for dog owners everywhere. Each box contains 120 durable bags made from biodegradable materials that break down faster than traditional plastic—making a difference for your local environment. The unscented formulation is perfect for sensitive dogs or owners who prefer no added fragrance. From morning walks to backyard clean-up, Smart Choice bags are your go-to solution for clean, reliable pet waste disposal—with less impact on the planet.
